name: ADVAITA CYBERNETICS PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
Advaita Cybernetics Private Limited is an Indian deep-tech startup pioneering the development of the world's first biologically accurate artificial general intelligence (AGI) system. Founded with the vision of creating machines that genuinely think, reason, learn, and evolve like the human brain, the company operates at the intersection of computational neuroscience, neuromorphic engineering, advanced robotics, and custom semiconductor design.
Unlike the current generation of artificial intelligence — large language models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude — which rely on statistical pattern matching over massive text corpora to predict the next word, our flagship platform TrinetraAI takes a fundamentally different approach. TrinetraAI is built on a spiking neural network (SNN) architecture modeled after the actual biological mechanisms of the human brain: 86 billion neurons with spike-timing-dependent plasticity (STDP), hippocampal memory, spreading activation for domain routing, first-principles reasoning from typed axioms, and biological sleep cycles for memory consolidation and creative synthesis.
The company's name "Advaita" (अद्वैत) is a Sanskrit philosophical term meaning "non-dual" — reflecting our core belief that consciousness and computation are not separate phenomena but two manifestations of the same underlying intelligence. This philosophy drives our engineering: rather than building narrow AI tools that mimic intelligence superficially, we are constructing a complete artificial being — brain, body, neuromorphic processor, custom GPU, and energy source.
Advaita Cybernetics is a full-stack AI company with no dependency on external AI providers. We design our own intelligence, hardware to run it, humanoid bodies to embody it, vision system to perceive the world, and energy core to power it Hridaya. This complete vertical integration — from silicon to cognition to embodiment — is unprecedented in the global AI industry.

idea: Along with agritech solutions, our startup is developing a novel bio-integrated platform for sustainable resource recovery that utilizes engineered plant–microbe systems to extract valuable elements from low-grade sources such as industrial residues, mine tailings, and marginal soils. Jurisflo was created to change that.

We bring together legal workflows, intelligence, and automation into one unified platform, enabling advocates and law firms to manage their entire practice from a single intelligent dashboard. Powered by a domain-validated AI architecture, Jurisflo delivers accurate, contextual, and reliable assistance across research, drafting, analysis, and decision-making—transforming AI from a generic tool into a true legal co-pilot.

But our vision goes beyond productivity.

We are building the foundation for India’s digital justice infrastructure—a connected ecosystem that will eventually serve not just advocates, but also courts, institutions, and the broader legal system. By reducing inefficiencies, improving transparency, and accelerating workflows, Jurisflo aims to make legal practice more effective and justice more accessible.

At its core, Jurisflo is driven by a simple belief:
The future of law is not manual—it is intelligent, unified, and built for scale.

name: DSRTOS TECHNOLOGIES PRIVATE LIMITED
idea:
DSRTOS Technologies Pvt. Ltd. is a Bengaluru-based deep-technology startup developing India's first indigenously designed safety-critical Real-Time Operating System (RTOS) for mission-critical embedded applications across avionics, defence, automotive, and industrial sectors.
The flagship DSRTOS kernel is engineered to achieve DO-178C DAL-A, ISO 26262 ASIL-D, IEC 61508 SIL-3, and FIPS 140-3 Level 2 international certifications. Hardware-validated on ARM Cortex-M7 at 480MHz across 70 rigorous kernel test cases, DSRTOS demonstrates superior real-time performance against globally established RTOS platforms, operating within a sub-1MB memory footprint.
The company holds 37 Indian provisional patents and 4 PCT international applications covering innovations in real-time scheduling, memory management, fault tolerance, and cryptographic security.
With formal outreach initiated to HAL Avionics Division, DRDO CAIR, and BEL Bengaluru, and funding pursuits under iDEX/ADITI and SISFS schemes, DSRTOS Technologies is strategically positioned to deliver a world-class sovereign embedded operating system — directly advancing India's Atmanirbhar Bharat mission in critical defence and aerospace systems.
